description: Skill helper e2e: Iter 1 reasoning calls probe_repo + pack_repo on a temp dir (no workers). Iter 2 reasoning calls shard_repo + llm_query_batched with 2 prompts (2 workers). Iter 3 reasoning returns FINAL.

args.code:
import os, pathlib, tempfile, shutil

td = tempfile.mkdtemp(prefix="skill_test_")
for name, content in [
    ("alpha/a.py", "x = 1\n" * 50),
    ("beta/b.py", "y = 2\n" * 50),
    ("gamma/c.py", "z = 3\n" * 50),
    ("delta/d.py", "w = 4\n" * 50),
]:
    p = pathlib.Path(td) / name
    p.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    p.write_text(content)

info = probe_repo(td, calculate_tokens=False)
assert info.total_files == 4, f"Expected 4 files, got {info.total_files}"
assert info.total_chars > 0, "Expected non-zero chars"
print(f"probe: files={info.total_files}, chars={info.total_chars}")

xml = pack_repo(td, calculate_tokens=False)
assert "<file" in xml, "Expected <file tag in XML output"
assert len(xml) > 100, f"Expected substantial XML, got {len(xml)} chars"
print(f"pack: xml_len={len(xml)}")

sr = shard_repo(td, calculate_tokens=False)
assert len(sr.chunks) >= 1, f"Expected >= 1 chunk, got {len(sr.chunks)}"
assert sr.total_files == 4, f"Expected 4 files in shards, got {sr.total_files}"
print(f"shard: chunks={len(sr.chunks)}, files={sr.total_files}")

prompts = [
    f"Summarize section A:\n{sr.chunks[0][:200]}",
    f"Summarize section B:\n{sr.chunks[-1][:200]}"
]
analyses = llm_query_batched(prompts)
assert len(analyses) == 2, f"Expected 2 analyses, got {len(analyses)}"
combined = " | ".join(analyses)
print(f"analyses: {combined}")

shutil.rmtree(td)

parts.text: Section A contains Python variable assignments (x=1, y=2) repeated across alpha and beta modules.
Section B contains Python variable assignments (z=3, w=4) in gamma and delta modules.

All three skill helpers validated:
- probe_repo: 4 files found
- pack_repo: XML output with <file tags
- shard_repo: chunks produced, worker analyses returned

FINAL(skill_helpers_validated: probe=4_files, pack=xml_ok, shard=chunks_ok, batched=2_analyses)
